title: Move all storage configuration defaults into libpod
body:
Instead of passing in defaults via WithStorageConfig after computing them in cmd/podman/libpodruntime, do all defaults in libpod itself.

This can alleviate ordering issues which caused settings in the libpod config (most notably, volume path) to be ignored.

This ended up being a lot simpler than I thought it would be, and un-breaks `volume_path` in the libpod config.
